stutteranalyzer.cmd.no_permission: You do not have permission to use this command.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.client_only: This command is only available on the client side.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.debug_disabled: Debug mode is disabled. Enable it in stutteranalyzer-common.toml to use debug commands.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.status.degraded: One or more subsystems are degraded. Use /sa health for details.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.status.monitoring: server tick, memory, GC, chunk events
stutteranalyzer.cmd.report.no_data: No freeze data collected yet. Trigger a freeze or wait for a spike.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.report.export_auto: Reports are saved as .md and .json automatically after each freeze.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.report.list_location: Full report list is in config/stutter-analyzer/reports/
stutteranalyzer.cmd.report.no_unknown: No unknown freeze reports in current session.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.report.not_found: Report not found in memory: %s. Check config/stutter-analyzer/reports/
stutteranalyzer.cmd.report.delete_note: Delete request noted for: %s. Delete the file manually from config/stutter-analyzer/reports/
stutteranalyzer.cmd.config.reloaded: Config reloaded. Some values require restart.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.config.debug_enable: Set debug = true in stutteranalyzer-common.toml and reload config.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.config.debug_disable: Set debug = false in stutteranalyzer-common.toml and reload config.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.crash.none: No imported crash reports from this session.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.crash.export_hint: Crash export: check config/stutter-analyzer/reports/ and crash-reports/ for hint files related to: %s
stutteranalyzer.cmd.guard.emergency_warn: Emergency mode is ON. Safe guards may activate automatically.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.guard.no_reports: No guard reports from this session.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.status: /sa status            - Analyzer status and current freeze count
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.health: /sa health            - Subsystem health. Green good, yellow suspicious, red please look at me.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.last: /sa last              - Last detected freeze, if Minecraft recently had a dramatic pause
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.report: /sa report            - Generate report from current data
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.export: /sa export            - Export latest report for GitHub, Discord, or your nearest support channel
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.submit_crash: /sa submit crash last - Submit last crash report
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.submit_guard: /sa submit guard last - Submit last guard report
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.guard_cmds: /sa guard status/list/info/enable/disable/report - Guard commands. Seatbelts, not sorcery.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.f3: /sa f3 on/off/toggle/status - F3 status line toggle (client only)
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.selfcheck: /sa selfcheck / /sa test - Checks whether the analyzer is alive, awake, and not crying in the logs
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.config: /sa config reload     - Reload config (some values require restart)
stutteranalyzer.cmd.help.debug: /sa debug ...         - Debug commands (requires op + debug mode)
stutteranalyzer.cmd.selfcheck.unknown_fr: Unknown Freeze in last report! Use /sa submit last to report it.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.f3.enabled_session: F3 status line enabled for this session.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.f3.disabled_session: F3 status line disabled for this session.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.client.no_data: No client-side freeze events recorded yet.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.client.report_not_im: Client report generation not yet implemented.
stutteranalyzer.submit.disabled: Manual submission is disabled in config.
stutteranalyzer.submit.no_report: No freeze report available to submit.
stutteranalyzer.submit.not_found: Report not found in memory: %s. Try /sa export to find the file path.
stutteranalyzer.submit.prepared_open_hin: Open the issue page and paste or attach the prepared report manually.
stutteranalyzer.submit.opening_issue_url: Opening GitHub issue page in browser...
stutteranalyzer.submit.confirm_disabled: Direct upload is disabled in public builds for safety.
stutteranalyzer.submit.confirm_use_files: Use the prepared files in config/stutter-analyzer/submissions/%s and submit manually.
stutteranalyzer.submit.token_deprecated: GitHub token config is deprecated and ignored for safety.
stutteranalyzer.submit.token_deprecated_: Reports are prepared locally. Submit them manually through GitHub Issues.
stutteranalyzer.submit.cloudflare_upload: Uploading report to Stutter Analyzer report server...
stutteranalyzer.submit.cloudflare_ok: Report submitted. ID: %s. No account needed. Thank you.
stutteranalyzer.submit.cloudflare_no_acc: Report stored anonymously. No GitHub account required.
stutteranalyzer.submit.cloudflare_error: Upload error. Check your internet connection.
stutteranalyzer.startup.loaded: Loaded. Press F3 to see SA status or use /sa selfcheck.
stutteranalyzer.startup.loaded_silent: [SA] Loaded. Minor stutters are tracked silently. Press F3 or use /sa status.
stutteranalyzer.unknown_freeze.notify: Unknown freeze detected. Report saved. Use /sa submit last to send it.
stutteranalyzer.unknown_freeze.notify_du: Unknown freeze detected (%s ms). Report saved. Use /sa submit last to send it.
stutteranalyzer.verbose.enabled: [SA] Verbose mode enabled for this session.
stutteranalyzer.verbose.enabled_hint: [SA] Minor and medium stutters will be shown in chat with cooldown.
stutteranalyzer.verbose.reports_unaffect: [SA] Reports are still only saved according to report thresholds.
stutteranalyzer.verbose.disabled: [SA] Verbose mode disabled. Minor stutters will be tracked silently.
stutteranalyzer.verbose.aggregate: [SA] Repeated small stutters: %s in %ss, worst %sms. Tracking silently. Use /sa status.
stutteranalyzer.verbose.test_minor_hint: Use /sa verbose on to see minor stutters in chat.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.status.minor_silent_: [SA] Minor stutters are being tracked silently. Use /sa verbose on to show them in chat temporarily.
stutteranalyzer.f3.active_full_last: SA: ACTIVE | Last: %s %s ms | Report saved
stutteranalyzer.f3.active_full_no_freeze: SA: ACTIVE | FPS watch: ON | Last freeze: none | Reports: %s
stutteranalyzer.cmd.crash.submit_id_hint: Submit by crash ID is not yet available. Use /sa crash show %s to view the report.
stutteranalyzer.cmd.guard.submit_id_hint: Submit by guard ID is not yet available. Use /sa guard report last.
